message:
Close bead git_safety_guard-91rr: Database pack explanations verified complete

Verified all database pack patterns have comprehensive explanations:
- MySQL (10 patterns): drop-database, drop-table, truncate-table, etc.
- PostgreSQL (7 patterns): drop-database, drop-table, drop-schema, etc.
- SQLite (4 patterns): drop-table, delete-without-where, etc.
- MongoDB (5 patterns): drop-database, drop-collection, etc.
- Redis (6 patterns): flushall, flushdb, debug-crash, etc.

All explanations follow quality standards: emphasize data loss,
mention backup/recovery, note differences from similar commands.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
